fields.description:
## Why

ADR 0017 and `.rebar/criteria_routing.json` advertise one project-criteria extension surface across
plan review and code review, but the current code-review runtime only executes the static workflow
list and consults packaged decision/eval lookups. A project can therefore configure a net-new
LLM-backed code-review criterion that merges successfully yet never runs end to end.

## What

Complete the generic, project-id-agnostic code-review runtime seam. The child bug
`8a4b-e8b6-1bf9-48d8` owns the reproduced defect and implementation details. This story owns the
delivered capability and compatibility contract: activated project criteria run exactly once,
their repository prompt and eval assets resolve through the CLI, and deterministic Pass 3 uses
repository-effective routing.

## Scope

- Reuse plan review's runner-side dynamic fan-in pattern without adding a workflow DSL field or a
  hard-coded project criterion id.
- Map a logical `project.<name>` criterion to physical prompt id
  `code-review-project-<name-with-dots-replaced-by-dashes>`; for this epic the physical prompt/eval
  basename is `code-review-project-review-phase-boundaries`.
- Resolve project prompt/eval assets from the reviewed repository snapshot and report located
  configuration errors for activated missing or malformed assets.
- Extend `criteria eval` preflight to accept a logical id only when it is active in code review's
  repository-effective criteria; continue to reject unknown or inactive ids before solver dispatch.
- Preserve the existing behavior and result shape for repositories without a code-review project
  overlay.
- Update `docs/llm-framework.md` to describe code-review project-criterion runtime resolution,
  configuration failures, and the eval entry point, completing rather than replacing ADR 0017.

Out of scope: authoring `project.review-phase-boundaries`, changing four-pass decision math,
modifying packaged built-in criteria, or deploying a Gerrit criterion.

## Sequencing and Rollback

The child bug is implemented and closed before this story closes. Downstream criterion authoring
depends on this story. Revert the fan-in, routing lookup, eval resolution, tests, and documentation
together if overlay-absent compatibility regresses; the additive seam has no data migration.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Child bug `8a4b-e8b6-1bf9-48d8` is closed and its change is landed on `main`; verify with
  `.venv/bin/rebar show 8a4b-e8b6-1bf9-48d8` and
  `git log origin/main --oneline --grep='rebar-ticket: 8a4b-e8b6-1bf9-48d8'`.
- [ ] A synthetic activated code-review `project.*` criterion runs exactly once in Pass 1, retains
  its logical criterion id, and resolves validator-safe repository prompt/eval ids; verify with
  `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_code_review_project_criteria.py -k 'fan_in or eval'`.
- [ ] Pass 3 applies repository-effective threshold, blocking posture, and nit-suppression routing
  for the synthetic id without invoking an LLM; verify with
  `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_code_review_project_criteria.py -k routing`.
- [ ] Activated missing/malformed project assets produce located configuration errors and an
  overlay-absent repository retains its pre-change result; verify with
  `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_code_review_project_criteria.py -k 'missing or parity'`.
- [ ] `rebar criteria eval` accepts an activated logical code-review project id, maps it to the
  sanitized physical prompt id, and rejects unknown/inactive ids; verify with
  `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_code_review_project_criteria.py -k cli`.
- [ ] `docs/llm-framework.md` documents the completed code-review project-criterion runtime and the
  focused regression suites pass; verify with
  `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_unified_criteria.py tests/unit/test_code_review_evals.py
  tests/unit/workflow/test_code_review_workflow.py && make lint`.
